summary: Iteration 2 testing of Spectra Flow completed. All new features verified: Real Resend email integration, API key masking, Spanish lead statuses, quality parameter breakdown, editable automations. Fixed 2 frontend bugs during testing. Backend 100% pass rate (23/23 tests), Frontend 95% functional after fixes.

minor.issue: Returns 500 if Resend API fails (expected behavior)

issues: Chart rendering warnings - width/height (-1) should be greater than 0 (known issue from iteration 1)

fixed_during_testing.issue: Missing Separator import causing 'Separator is not defined' error
SelectItem with empty string value causing 'must have a value prop' error in automation edit dialog
fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed value='' to value='none' with conversion logic

passed_tests: Settings > Empresa tab has company fields (industry, phone, tax_id, country, website, address, description) without color pickers
Settings > Integrations shows masked API keys (***configured*** and app-****...uOGs) with pencil edit buttons
Leads page shows Spanish status labels (Calificado, Aprobado, Rechazado, Limpiado, Enviado al CRM)
Lead detail drawer shows 'Parametros de Calidad' section with score breakdown (+20 Sitio web, +15 Email, +10 Telefono, +10 Direccion)
Settings > Dominios shows spectra-metrics.com as verified with Sync Resend button
POST /api/domains/sync-resend syncs domain status from Resend API
Email Marketing > Automations tab has Edit/Pause/Delete buttons per automation
Automation edit dialog shows trigger selector, step editor with add Email/Wait/Condition buttons
critical_code_review_comments: EmailMarketingPage.js was missing Separator import - FIXED
SelectItem with empty value in automation edit dialog - FIXED
seed_data_creation: None required - existing data sufficient for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 2 are working: Resend email integration (spectra-metrics.com verified), API key masking in Settings > Integrations, Spanish lead statuses, quality parameter breakdown in lead detail, editable automations in Email Marketing. Two frontend bugs were fixed during testing (missing Separator import and SelectItem empty value). Campaign simulation still uses random data (MOCKED). Real email sending via Resend is functional.

edit_dialog.trigger_selector: Manual, Lead aprobado, Lead calificado, etc.
